project.name: Default
project.description:
This is a default Open Observer project.
Since the original purpose of Open Observer was to help record marine wildlife sightings, this template uses Oceanic Species as its primary observation field. You can start using it right away to record your observations, import a project template specifically designed for your mission, or create your own custom project from scratch.
We hope you enjoy using Open Observer and look forward to your feedback: info@atlasexpeditions.org - www.atlasexpeditions.org
The Open Observer Team
